decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id entity_mta-nyct already resolves to the correct canonical registry record for MTA New York City Transit. The observation payload (entity_name 'MTA New York City Transit', entity_type 'agency', acronym 'MTA NYCT') matches the registry record entity_mta-nyct exactly. Per rule, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new — never link to your own base_record_id.

proposed_relations.description: MTA NYCT and NYC DOT are joint project leads for the First Avenue/Second Avenue Select Bus Service project, co-presenting at CAC Meeting #4 on April 29, 2010.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The logo for the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) New York City Transit, featuring a blue circle with the white letters 'MTA' and the text 'New York City Transit' in blue.
The logo for the New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT), featuring a green square with the text 'NEW YORK CITY' at the top and three stylized white horizontal bars below.
The logo for the Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA) New York City Transit, featuring a blue circle with the white letters 'MTA' and the text 'New York City Transit' in blue.

The observation payload (entity_name 'New York City Department of Transportation', entity_type 'agency', acronym 'NYC DOT') matches the registry record entity_nyc-dot exactly.
